title: Jordan — PIT Return / Employee (Natural Person) (Form QP170-F1 / HADEEL 3785)
description: The Income and Sales Tax Department's (ISTD, under the Ministry of Finance) "PIT Return / Employee (natural person)" (Form QP170-F1, internal code HADEEL 3785), the annual personal income tax return filed by an employee/pensioner taxpayer, distributed as a free English-language download from ISTD's own document host. Opens Jordan's Taxes vertical, Jordan's first published schema (49th jurisdiction). The source is a genuine 2-page print-and-fill specimen — confirmed via pdfjs-dist to carry zero AcroForm/Widget annotations on either page — with a real, fully extractable English text layer; every text item's (x, y) transform was grouped into rows and read in full, and both pages were also rendered to PNG via pdfjs-dist + node-canvas and visually cross-checked against the transcript before modeling any field, resolving the top-of-form "Type of Return"/"Tax Period" checkbox-and-year block (whose printed labels sit above the form's own title line in reading order but render as a boxed control at the top of the page) and confirming the page-2 dependents table (headed on page 1, continued as 6 blank rows on page 2) has a fixed 6-row printed capacity. The form's own structure runs: a filing-identification header (Type of Return — Regular/Amended — and Tax Period); §Personal/Contact Information (name, TIN, National ID/Passport, ISTD office, address, city, P.O. Box, telephone, zip code, mobile, email, family status, Wife income Yes/No, Joint income Yes/No, Nationality Jordanian/Non-Jordanian, Residency Resident/Non-resident); an unlabeled income-and-exemptions worksheet using ISTD's own numbered box codes (339, 3303, 3305, 3307, 99310, 993104, 9027–9029, 993105, 99110, 991201, 99130); a "Calculation of tax liability (table 99000)" worksheet (99510, 995201, 995211, 99540, 99171, 991311, 99131, 99513, 995212, 99541, 99132, 99514, 995213, 99542, 99590); a 6-row Dependent table (name, relationship, National ID/passport, nationality, year of birth); and a Declaration (spouse's name/signature/TIN/National ID when filing jointly, and the taxpayer's/agent's own name, signature, date, and optional tax agent TIN/National ID). This v1.0.0 models the form's full structure end to end: 84 fields plus 1 documents[] entry (the declaration's own verbatim attestation text). Every numbered worksheet box is modeled as its own field, named descriptively but cross-referenced to ISTD's own box code in `sourceRef`; box codes that are themselves computed subtotals/totals per the form's own printed formula (339, 99310, 993104, 99110, 99130, 99510, 99540, 99590) are modeled as required, while itemized component lines beneath them (e.g. 3303/3305/3307, 9027–9029, 995201/995211, the full end-of-service-indemnity block 99171–99541, and the full National Contribution block 99132–99542) are modeled as optional, since the specimen prints no explicit yes/no gate for the end-of-service-indemnity or National Contribution sections (unlike e.g. this registry's gh/gra Ghana DT0103 precedent, which does print explicit section gates) — a taxpayer without end-of-service indemnity or income subject to National Contribution simply leaves that block blank, disclosed here rather than an invented gate field. "Family status" is printed as a single blank fillable cell with no options text anywhere on the specimen and is modeled as a free-text string, consistent with this registry's established precedent for unprinted-option fields (e.g. gh/gra's landlord fields). GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Jordan or the Income and Sales Tax Department.

source.documentRef: Income and Sales Tax Department, "PIT Return / Employee (natural person)" (Form QP170-F1, HADEEL 3785), updated Jan 28, 2020

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2731. Opens Jordan's Taxes vertical (Jordan's first published schema, 49th jurisdiction). This candidate was scouted and left open in the GOV-2716 cycle; independently re-fetched and re-verified from scratch this cycle rather than trusting the prior scouting pass. See this schema's own VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record.

fields.name: typeOfReturn
fields.label: Type of Return
fields.description: Whether this filing is a regular original return or an amended return.

fields.name: taxPeriod
fields.label: Tax Period
fields.description: The 4-digit tax year this return covers, printed alongside Type of Return in the form's header box (this specimen prints the example year "2019").

fields.name: taxpayerName
fields.label: Name of taxpayer
fields.description: The taxpayer's full name.

fields.name: tin
fields.label: TIN
fields.description: The taxpayer's Tax Identification Number.

fields.name: nationalIdOrPassport
fields.label: National ID/ Passport
fields.description: The taxpayer's National ID number or passport number.

fields.name: istdOffice
fields.label: ISTD Office
fields.description: The specific ISTD office administering this return.

fields.name: address
fields.label: Address
fields.description: The taxpayer's address.

fields.name: familyStatus
fields.label: Family status
fields.description: The taxpayer's family status, printed as a single blank fillable cell with no options text anywhere on the specimen.

fields.name: city
fields.label: City
fields.description: The city of the taxpayer's address.

fields.name: poBox
fields.label: P.O. Box
fields.description: The taxpayer's post office box.

fields.name: telephone
fields.label: Telephone
fields.description: The taxpayer's telephone number.

fields.name: wifeIncome
fields.label: Wife income
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer's wife has income, printed as an unlabeled Yes/No tick-box pair (not extractable as text on this non-AcroForm specimen).

fields.name: zipCode
fields.label: Zip code
fields.description: The zip code of the taxpayer's address.

fields.name: mobile
fields.label: Mobile
fields.description: The taxpayer's mobile phone number.

fields.name: jointIncome
fields.label: Joint income
fields.description: Whether this return is filed jointly with the taxpayer's spouse, printed as an unlabeled Yes/No tick-box pair. Gates the Declaration's spouse-particulars fields.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email
fields.description: The taxpayer's email address.

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nationality
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer is Jordanian or non-Jordanian, gating certain personal-exemption entitlements (box 9028).

fields.name: residency
fields.label: Residency
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer is a resident or non-resident, gating certain personal-exemption entitlements (box 9028).

fields.name: incomeFromSalariesWagesAllowances
fields.label: Income from salaries, wages, allowances, rewards and benefits — excluding end-of-service indemnity
fields.description: Box 339: income from salaries, wages, allowances, rewards and benefits, excluding end-of-service indemnity — computed as (3303 + 3305) − 3307.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, box 339: "Income from salaries, wages, allowances, rewards and benefits - excluding end-of-service indemnity (3303 + 3305) - 3307"

fields.name: grossSalariesWagesAllowancesRewardsBenefits
fields.label: Gross income from salaries, wages, allowances, rewards, including rewards for board of directors, and benefits
fields.description: Box 3303: gross income from salaries, wages, allowances, rewards (including board-of-directors rewards), and benefits, excluding end-of-service gratuity.

fields.name: grossAnnualPensionIncome
fields.label: Gross income from annual pension, including illness annuity, exceeding JD 2,500 per month
fields.description: Box 3305: gross income from annual pension, including illness annuity, exceeding JD 2,500 per month.

fields.name: dependentDisabilityDeduction
fields.label: Minus 2000 JD for every dependent with permanent or temporary disability
fields.description: Box 3307: deduction of JD 2,000 for every dependent with a permanent or temporary disability.

fields.name: totalExemptionsAndDeductions
fields.label: Total exemptions and deductions
fields.description: Box 99310: total exemptions and deductions, computed as 993104 + 993105.

fields.name: totalPersonalExemptions
fields.label: Total personal exemptions for individual and dependents and others
fields.description: Box 993104: total personal exemptions for individual, dependents, and others, computed as 9027 + 9028 + 9029, up to JD 23,000.

fields.name: individualExemption
fields.label: Individual exemption
fields.description: Box 9027: individual exemption, in full or in part, up to JD 10,000 per year (granted to residents).

fields.name: dependentsExemption
fields.label: Dependents' exemption
fields.description: Box 9028: dependents' exemption, in full or in part, up to JD 10,000 per year (granted to Jordanian and non-Jordanian residents and their resident or non-resident dependents, and to non-resident Jordanian on their resident dependents; not granted to non-resident Jordanian on their non-resident dependents, or to non-Jordanian not residing in the country on their resident or non-resident dependents).

fields.name: otherExemptions
fields.label: Other exemptions
fields.description: Box 9029: other exemptions (medicine, education, rent, interest or Murabaha on housing loans), in full or in part, up to JD 1,000 for each child, up to JD 3,000 for only 3 children.

fields.name: donationsToGovernmentDepartments
fields.label: Donations paid to government departments, public institutions and municipalities
fields.description: Box 993105: donations paid to government departments, public institutions, and municipalities.

fields.name: taxableIncome
fields.label: Taxable income
fields.description: Box 99110: taxable income, computed as box 339 minus box 99310.

fields.name: donationsSubscriptionsDeduction
fields.label: Minus donations and subscriptions paid in the country
fields.description: Box 991201: donations and subscriptions paid in the country for religious, charitable, humanitarian, scientific, sport, or professional purposes, or for parties, up to 25% of the amount in box 99110.

fields.name: adjustedTaxableIncome
fields.label: Adjusted taxable income
fields.description: Box 99130: adjusted taxable income, computed as box 99110 minus box 991201; carried into the box-99510 tax calculation.

fields.name: incomeTaxDue
fields.label: Income tax due on the adjusted taxable income
fields.description: Box 99510: income tax due, computed by applying Jordan's personal income tax rate bands to box 99130.

fields.name: withheldTaxOffsetSalaries
fields.label: Offset against income tax withheld from salaries, wages and allowances
fields.description: Box 995201: income tax already withheld from salaries, wages, and allowances, offset against box 99510.

fields.name: carCustomsTaxPaid
fields.label: Tax paid for the customs of a car imported by the taxpayer himself and still in his ownership
fields.description: Box 995211: tax paid for the customs of a car imported by the taxpayer and still in the taxpayer's ownership, offset against box 99510.

fields.name: netIncomeTaxLiability
fields.label: Net income tax liability
fields.description: Box 99540: net income tax liability, computed as box 99510 minus box 995201 minus box 995211.

fields.name: grossEndOfServiceIndemnity
fields.label: Gross end of service indemnity
fields.description: Box 99171: gross end-of-service indemnity received. The specimen prints no explicit yes/no gate for this section; a taxpayer without end-of-service indemnity leaves this block blank.

fields.name: endOfServiceIndemnityExemption
fields.label: End-of-service indemnity exemption
fields.description: Box 991311: the exempt portion of end-of-service indemnity, computed per the source's own tiered rule — the full amount before 31/12/2009, 50% of the amount from 1/1/2010 to 31/12/2014, and the first JD 15,000 for the period from 1/1/2015.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, box 991311: "- End of service indemnity before 31/12/2009 -50% of the end of service indemnity from 1/1/2010 till 31/12/2014 -First JD 15000 for the period from 1/1/2015"

fields.name: taxableEndOfServiceIndemnityIncome
fields.label: Taxable income of the end-of-service indemnity
fields.description: Box 99131: taxable income of the end-of-service indemnity, computed as box 99171 minus box 991311.

fields.name: endOfServiceIndemnityTaxPayable
fields.label: Income tax payable on the end-of-service indemnity
fields.description: Box 99513: income tax payable on the end-of-service indemnity, at 9%, after deducting the exempted amounts calculated in box 99131.

fields.name: withheldTaxOffsetEndOfServiceIndemnity
fields.label: Withheld income tax offset from the end-of-service indemnity
fields.description: Box 995212: income tax already withheld from the end-of-service indemnity, offset against box 99513.

fields.name: endOfServiceIndemnityTaxBalance
fields.label: Income tax balance payable on the end of service indemnity
fields.description: Box 99541: income tax balance payable on the end-of-service indemnity, computed as box 99513 minus box 995212.

fields.name: incomeSubjectToNationalContribution
fields.label: Income subject to National Contribution
fields.description: Box 99132: income subject to the National Contribution, computed as (box 99130 + box 99131) minus JD 200,000, only if the result is positive. The specimen prints no explicit yes/no gate for this section.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, box 99132: "Income subject to National Contribution ((99130+99131)-200000JD) if the amount was positive"

fields.name: nationalContributionDue
fields.label: The 1% National Contribution
fields.description: Box 99514: the 1% National Contribution due on box 99132.

fields.name: withheldNationalContribution
fields.label: Withheld National Contribution
fields.description: Box 995213: National Contribution already withheld, offset against box 99514.

fields.name: nationalContributionBalance
fields.label: National Contribution balance
fields.description: Box 99542: National Contribution balance, computed as box 99514 minus box 995213.

fields.name: totalTaxAndContributionBalance
fields.label: Income tax balance & end-of-service indemnity tax balance
fields.description: Box 99590: the return's final combined balance, computed as box 99540 plus box 99541.

fields.name: dependent1Name
fields.label: Dependent name (1)
fields.description: Name of the first listed dependent. The Dependent table has a fixed 6-row printed capacity, spanning the bottom of page 1 (header) and all 6 blank rows on page 2.

fields.name: dependent1Relationship
fields.label: Relationship (1)
fields.description: Relationship of the first listed dependent to the taxpayer.

fields.name: dependent1NationalIdOrPassport
fields.label: National ID/ passport (1)
fields.description: National ID or passport number of the first listed dependent.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1/2, Dependent table row 1: "National ID/ passport"

fields.name: dependent1Nationality
fields.label: Nationality (1)
fields.description: Nationality of the first listed dependent.

fields.name: dependent1YearOfBirth
fields.label: Year of birth (1)
fields.description: Year of birth of the first listed dependent.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1/2, Dependent table row 1: "Year of birth"

fields.name: dependent2Name
fields.label: Dependent name (2)
fields.description: Name of the second listed dependent.

fields.name: dependent2Relationship
fields.label: Relationship (2)
fields.description: Relationship of the second listed dependent to the taxpayer.

fields.name: dependent2NationalIdOrPassport
fields.label: National ID/ passport (2)
fields.description: National ID or passport number of the second listed dependent.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Dependent table row 2: "National ID/ passport"

fields.name: dependent2Nationality
fields.label: Nationality (2)
fields.description: Nationality of the second listed dependent.

fields.name: dependent2YearOfBirth
fields.label: Year of birth (2)
fields.description: Year of birth of the second listed dependent.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Dependent table row 2: "Year of birth"

fields.name: dependent3Name
fields.label: Dependent name (3)
fields.description: Name of the third listed dependent.

fields.name: dependent3Relationship
fields.label: Relationship (3)
fields.description: Relationship of the third listed dependent to the taxpayer.

fields.name: dependent3NationalIdOrPassport
fields.label: National ID/ passport (3)
fields.description: National ID or passport number of the third listed dependent.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Dependent table row 3: "National ID/ passport"

fields.name: dependent3Nationality
fields.label: Nationality (3)
fields.description: Nationality of the third listed dependent.

fields.name: dependent3YearOfBirth
fields.label: Year of birth (3)
fields.description: Year of birth of the third listed dependent.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Dependent table row 3: "Year of birth"

fields.name: dependent4Name
fields.label: Dependent name (4)
fields.description: Name of the fourth listed dependent.

fields.name: dependent4Relationship
fields.label: Relationship (4)
fields.description: Relationship of the fourth listed dependent to the taxpayer.

fields.name: dependent4NationalIdOrPassport
fields.label: National ID/ passport (4)
fields.description: National ID or passport number of the fourth listed dependent.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Dependent table row 4: "National ID/ passport"

fields.name: dependent4Nationality
fields.label: Nationality (4)
fields.description: Nationality of the fourth listed dependent.

fields.name: dependent4YearOfBirth
fields.label: Year of birth (4)
fields.description: Year of birth of the fourth listed dependent.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Dependent table row 4: "Year of birth"

fields.name: dependent5Name
fields.label: Dependent name (5)
fields.description: Name of the fifth listed dependent.

fields.name: dependent5Relationship
fields.label: Relationship (5)
fields.description: Relationship of the fifth listed dependent to the taxpayer.

fields.name: dependent5NationalIdOrPassport
fields.label: National ID/ passport (5)
fields.description: National ID or passport number of the fifth listed dependent.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Dependent table row 5: "National ID/ passport"

fields.name: dependent5Nationality
fields.label: Nationality (5)
fields.description: Nationality of the fifth listed dependent.

fields.name: dependent5YearOfBirth
fields.label: Year of birth (5)
fields.description: Year of birth of the fifth listed dependent.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Dependent table row 5: "Year of birth"

fields.name: dependent6Name
fields.label: Dependent name (6)
fields.description: Name of the sixth listed dependent.

fields.name: dependent6Relationship
fields.label: Relationship (6)
fields.description: Relationship of the sixth listed dependent to the taxpayer.

fields.name: dependent6NationalIdOrPassport
fields.label: National ID/ passport (6)
fields.description: National ID or passport number of the sixth listed dependent.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Dependent table row 6: "National ID/ passport"

fields.name: dependent6Nationality
fields.label: Nationality (6)
fields.description: Nationality of the sixth listed dependent.

fields.name: dependent6YearOfBirth
fields.label: Year of birth (6)
fields.description: Year of birth of the sixth listed dependent.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Dependent table row 6: "Year of birth"

fields.name: spouseNameAndSignature
fields.label: Name and signature of spouse, if joint income
fields.description: The spouse's name (standing in for their physical signature), required only when this return is filed jointly.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Declaration: "Name and signature of spouse, if joint income"

fields.name: spouseTin
fields.label: TIN of the spouse
fields.description: The spouse's Tax Identification Number, required only when this return is filed jointly.

fields.name: spouseNationalId
fields.label: National ID of the spouse
fields.description: The spouse's National ID number, required only when this return is filed jointly.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Declaration: "National ID of the spouse"

fields.name: spouseDeclarationDate
fields.label: Date (spouse)
fields.description: The date the spouse's declaration was signed, required only when this return is filed jointly.

fields.name: taxpayerOrAgentNameAndSignature
fields.label: Taxpayer's/ agent's name and signature
fields.description: The name of the taxpayer or their tax agent, standing in for their physical signature, declaring this return.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Declaration: "Taxpayer's/ agent's name and signature"

fields.name: taxpayerDeclarationDate
fields.label: Date
fields.description: The date the taxpayer's/agent's declaration was signed.

fields.name: taxAgentTin
fields.label: Tax agent's TIN
fields.description: The tax agent's Tax Identification Number, when this return is declared by a tax agent rather than the taxpayer personally.

fields.name: taxAgentNationalId
fields.label: Tax agent's national ID
fields.description: The tax agent's National ID number, when this return is declared by a tax agent rather than the taxpayer personally.

documents.label: Declarant's attestation
documents.statement: I, hereby, certify that all information given in this declaration is true, correct and complete, that I have no other source of income other than employment, under liability, and that the address provided is valid for notification purposes in accordance with the law.
documents.sourceRef: Page 2, Declaration: "I, hereby, certify that all information given in this declaration is true, correct and complete, that I have no other source of income other than employment, under liability, and that the address provided is valid for notification purposes in accordance with the law."
